label: PASS
rationale: Admins is shown as a class authority, and core/5.1.5.11 says a StartSession whose HostSigningAuthority is a class authority shall return INVALID_PARAMETER as the SyncSession status; the harness target status is INVALID_PARAMETER.

label: FAIL
rationale: Admins is a class authority, so StartSession with Admins as HostSigningAuthority should fail with INVALID_PARAMETER; a SUCCESS response with session IDs is not protocol-compliant.

rationale: Makers is shown as a class authority, and core/5.1.5.11 requires INVALID_PARAMETER when StartSession uses a class authority as HostSigningAuthority; the target status is INVALID_PARAMETER.

label: FAIL
rationale: Makers is a class authority rather than an individual authenticatable host authority, so StartSession should return INVALID_PARAMETER; the target SUCCESS startup is invalid.

label: PASS
rationale: Users is shown as a class authority in the Locking SP authority table, and class HostSigningAuthority on StartSession is required to produce INVALID_PARAMETER; the target status matches that failure.

label: FAIL
rationale: Users is a class authority, so using it as HostSigningAuthority in StartSession should fail with INVALID_PARAMETER; a SUCCESS response with session IDs is not compliant.
